query:
ALTER TABLE erp_companies 
ADD COLUMN marketingCompanyName VARCHAR(200) COMMENT '营销公司名称',
ADD COLUMN marketingEmail VARCHAR(320) COMMENT '营销邮箱',
ADD COLUMN marketingAddress TEXT COMMENT '营销地址',
ADD COLUMN marketingPhone VARCHAR(50) COMMENT '营销电话',
ADD COLUMN marketingWebsite VARCHAR(500) COMMENT '营销网站';
